## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Problem or need

What problem does this solve for you?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior, workflow, or UI change you expect.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative approaches you have considered.

## Additional context

Add any links, screenshots, or examples that help explain the request.
